Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python3 << 'EOF'
from werkzeug.security import generate_password_hash, check_password_hash
import sqlite3

known_password = 'TestPass123!'
new_hash = generate_password_hash\(known_password\)

conn = sqlite3.connect\('data/database.db'\)
conn.execute\("UPDATE users SET password_hash = ? WHERE username = 'rexa'", \(new_hash,\)\)
conn.commit\(\)
row = conn.execute\("SELECT password_hash FROM users WHERE username = 'rexa'"\).fetchone\(\)
print\(f"Verify: {check_password_hash\(row[0], known_password\)}"\)
conn.close\(\)
EOF)

Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python3 << 'EOF'
from werkzeug.security import generate_password_hash, check_password_hash
import sqlite3

known_password = 'TestPass123!'
# Use a compatible method
new_hash = generate_password_hash\(known_password, method='pbkdf2:sha256'\)

conn = sqlite3.connect\('data/database.db'\)
conn.execute\("UPDATE users SET password_hash = ? WHERE username = 'rexa'", \(new_hash,\)\)
conn.commit\(\)
row = conn.execute\("SELECT password_hash FROM users WHERE username = 'rexa'"\).fetchone\(\)
print\(f"Hash: {row[0][:30]}"\)
print\(f"Verify: {check_password_hash\(row[0], known_password\)}"\)
conn.close\(\)
EOF)

Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python3 << 'EOF'
import requests
import warnings
import json
import re
warnings.filterwarnings\('ignore'\)

BASE = 'http://localhost:5001'
session = requests.Session\(\)

# Step 1: Log in
login_resp = session.post\(f'{BASE}/login', data={
    'username': 'rexa',
    'password': 'TestPass123!'
}, allow_redirects=True\)
print\(f'Login: {login_resp.status_code} -> {login_resp.url}'\)
print\(f'Login page title: {re.search\(r"<title>\(.*?\)</title>", login_resp.text, re.I\).group\(1\) if re.search\(r"<title>\(.*?\)</title>", login_resp.text, re.I\) else "N/A"}'\)

# Step 2: Fetch the sell page with edit_listing_id=1
edit_resp = session.get\(f'{BASE}/sell?edit_listing_id=1', allow_redirects=True\)
print\(f'\\nEdit sell page GET: {edit_resp.status_code}'\)

# Check for prefill data
if 'sellPrefillData' in edit_resp.text:
    match = re.search\(r'window\\.sellPrefillData\\s*=\\s*\(\\{.*?\\}\);', edit_resp.text, re.DOTALL\)
    if match:
        try:
            prefill = json.loads\(match.group\(1\)\)
            print\(f'sellPrefillData keys: {list\(prefill.keys\(\)\)}'\)
            print\(f'  metal={prefill.get\("metal"\)}, product_line={prefill.get\("product_line"\)}, grade={prefill.get\("grade"\)}'\)
            print\(f'  price_per_coin={prefill.get\("price_per_coin"\)}, quantity={prefill.get\("quantity"\)}'\)
            print\(f'  existing_photos count={len\(prefill.get\("existing_photos", []\)\)}'\)
        except Exception as e:
            print\(f'JSON parse error: {e}'\)
            print\('Raw start:', match.group\(1\)[:200]\)
else:
    print\('WARNING: sellPrefillData NOT found in page!'\)

if 'sellEditMode' in edit_resp.text:
    match = re.search\(r'window\\.sellEditMode\\s*=\\s*\(\\w+\)', edit_resp.text\)
    if match:
        print\(f'sellEditMode = {match.group\(1\)}'\)
else:
    print\('WARNING: sellEditMode NOT found in page!'\)

EOF)

Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python3 << 'EOF'
import requests
import warnings
import json
import re
warnings.filterwarnings\('ignore'\)

BASE = 'http://localhost:5001'
session = requests.Session\(\)

# Login \(allow_redirects=False to capture redirect\)
login_resp = session.post\(f'{BASE}/login', data={
    'username': 'rexa',
    'password': 'TestPass123!'
}, allow_redirects=False\)
print\(f'Login: {login_resp.status_code}, Location: {login_resp.headers.get\("Location"\)}'\)

# Follow up with edit page
edit_resp = session.get\(f'{BASE}/sell?edit_listing_id=1', allow_redirects=True\)
print\(f'Edit sell page: {edit_resp.status_code} -> {edit_resp.url}'\)

if 'sellPrefillData' in edit_resp.text:
    match = re.search\(r'window\\.sellPrefillData\\s*=\\s*\(\\{.*?\\}\);', edit_resp.text, re.DOTALL\)
    if match:
        try:
            prefill = json.loads\(match.group\(1\)\)
            print\(f'  sellPrefillData keys: {sorted\(prefill.keys\(\)\)}'\)
            print\(f'  metal={prefill.get\("metal"\)}, product_type={prefill.get\("product_type"\)}, grade={prefill.get\("grade"\)}'\)
            print\(f'  series_variant={prefill.get\("series_variant"\)}, quantity={prefill.get\("quantity"\)}'\)
            print\(f'  price_per_coin={prefill.get\("price_per_coin"\)}'\)
            print\(f'  existing_photos={prefill.get\("existing_photos"\)}'\)
            print\(f'  listing_title={prefill.get\("listing_title"\)}'\)
        except Exception as e:
            print\(f'JSON error: {e}'\)
else:
    print\('WARNING: No sellPrefillData'\)
    
em = re.search\(r'window\\.sellEditMode\\s*=\\s*\(\\w+\)', edit_resp.text\)
print\(f'sellEditMode = {em.group\(1\) if em else "NOT FOUND"}'\)

# Check for edit_listing_id in hidden inputs
hid = re.search\(r'name="edit_listing_id"\\s+value="\(\\d+\)"', edit_resp.text\)
print\(f'edit_listing_id hidden input = {hid.group\(1\) if hid else "NOT FOUND"}'\)
EOF)

Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python3 << 'EOF'
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)

# Get current listing data from DB
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('data/database.db'\)
conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
listing = conn.execute\('''
    SELECT l.id, l.quantity, l.price_per_coin, l.pricing_mode, l.is_isolated, l.isolated_type,
           l.name, l.description, l.packaging_type, l.cert_number, l.condition_notes, l.actual_year,
           c.metal, c.product_line, c.product_type, c.purity, c.weight, c.mint, c.year, c.finish,
           c.grade, c.series_variant, c.condition_category,
           \(SELECT file_path FROM listing_photos WHERE listing_id = l.id LIMIT 1\) as photo_path
    FROM listings l
    JOIN categories c ON l.category_id = c.id
    WHERE l.id = 1
'''\).fetchone\(\)

print\("=== CURRENT LISTING 1 ==="\)
for k in listing.keys\(\):
    print\(f"  {k}: {listing[k]}"\)
conn.close\(\)
EOF)

import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)

from core import create_app

app = create_app\(\)

with app.test_client\(\) as client:
    # Step 1: Login as rexa \(user_id=3\) via test client
    with client.session_transaction\(\) as sess:
        sess['user_id'] = 3
        sess['username'] = 'rexa'
    
    # Step 2: GET /sell?edit_listing_id=1
    resp = client.get\('/sell?edit_listing_id=1'\)
    print\(f"GET /sell?edit_listing_id=1: {resp.status_code}"\)
    
    body = resp.data.decode\(\)
    
    import json, re
    match = re.search\(r'window\\.sellPrefillData\\s*=\\s*\(\\{.*?\\}\);', body, re.DOTALL\)
    if match:
        try:
            prefill = json.loads\(match.group\(1\)\)
            print\(f"sellPrefillData keys: {sorted\(prefill.keys\(\)\)}"\)
            print\(f"  metal: {prefill.get\('metal'\)}"\)
            print\(f"  product_line: {prefill.get\('product_line'\)}"\)
            print\(f"  product_type: {prefill.get\('product_type'\)}"\)
            print\(f"  weight: {prefill.get\('weight'\)}"\)
            print\(f"  purity: {prefill.get\('purity'\)}"\)
            print\(f"  mint: {prefill.get\('mint'\)}"\)
            print\(f"  year: {prefill.get\('year'\)}"\)
            print\(f"  finish: {prefill.get\('finish'\)}"\)
            print\(f"  grade: {prefill.get\('grade'\)}"\)
            print\(f"  series_variant: {prefill.get\('series_variant'\)}"\)
            print\(f"  price_per_coin: {prefill.get\('price_per_coin'\)}"\)
            print\(f"  quantity: {prefill.get\('quantity'\)}"\)
            print\(f"  packaging_type: {prefill.get\('packaging_type'\)}"\)
            print\(f"  existing_photos: {prefill.get\('existing_photos'\)}"\)
        except Exception as e:
            print\(f"JSON parse error: {e}, raw: {match.group\(1\)[:200]}"\)
    else:
        print\("NO sellPrefillData in response!"\)
        # Check if page loaded at all
        if 'sell' in body.lower\(\):
            print\("Sell page HTML found"\)
        else:
            print\("No sell page content found!"\)
    
    em = re.search\(r'window\\.sellEditMode\\s*=\\s*\(\\w+\)', body\)
    print\(f"sellEditMode = {em.group\(1\) if em else 'NOT FOUND'}"\)
    
    hid = re.search\(r'name="edit_listing_id"\\s+value="\(\\d+\)"', body\)
    print\(f"edit_listing_id hidden = {hid.group\(1\) if hid else 'NOT FOUND'}"\)
    
    # Check form action
    fa = re.search\(r'action="\([^"]*edit_listing[^"]*\)"', body\)
    print\(f"form action = {fa.group\(1\) if fa else 'NOT FOUND \(using default /sell\)'}"\)
EOF)

import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)

from core import create_app
app = create_app\(\)

# Directly test the DB query that the route uses
with app.app_context\(\):
    from database import get_db_connection
    import sqlite3
    
    with get_db_connection\(\) as conn:
        conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
        listing = conn.execute\(
            '''
            SELECT l.id AS listing_id, l.quantity, l.price_per_coin, l.pricing_mode,
                   l.spot_premium, l.floor_price, l.pricing_metal, l.graded,
                   l.grading_service, l.name AS listing_title,
                   l.description AS listing_description, l.is_isolated,
                   l.isolated_type, l.issue_number, l.issue_total,
                   l.edition_number, l.edition_total, l.packaging_type,
                   l.packaging_notes, l.cert_number, l.condition_notes,
                   l.actual_year,
                   c.metal, c.product_line, c.product_type, c.purity, c.weight,
                   c.mint, c.year, c.finish, c.grade, c.series_variant,
                   c.condition_category, c.coin_series
            FROM listings l
            JOIN categories c ON l.category_id = c.id
            WHERE l.id = ? AND l.seller_id = ?
            ''',
            \(1, 3\)
        \).fetchone\(\)
        
        if listing:
            print\("LISTING FOUND!"\)
            print\(f"  Keys: {listing.keys\(\)}"\)
            print\(f"  metal: {listing['metal']}"\)
            print\(f"  product_line: {listing['product_line']}"\)
            
            photos = conn.execute\(
                'SELECT id, file_path FROM listing_photos WHERE listing_id = ? ORDER BY id',
                \(1,\)
            \).fetchall\(\)
            print\(f"  Photos: {[dict\(p\) for p in photos]}"\)
        else:
            print\("LISTING NOT FOUND - query returned None"\)
EOF)

import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)

# Patch the sell route to add debug output
from core import create_app
from flask import request, session

app = create_app\(\)

# Monkey-patch the sell route to add debug output
with app.app_context\(\):
    # Find and patch the sell blueprint's sell function
    from core.blueprints.sell import sell_bp
    
    # Get the original sell view function
    original_view = sell_bp.view_functions.get\('sell'\)
    
    def debug_sell\(\):
        print\(f"=== DEBUG sell\(\) called ==="\)
        print\(f"  request.method: {request.method}"\)
        print\(f"  request.args: {dict\(request.args\)}"\)
        print\(f"  session: {dict\(session\)}"\)
        print\(f"  edit_listing_id raw: {request.args.get\('edit_listing_id'\)}"\)
        print\(f"  edit_listing_id int: {request.args.get\('edit_listing_id', type=int\)}"\)
        result = original_view\(\)
        print\(f"=== DEBUG sell\(\) done, result type: {type\(result\)} ==="\)
        return result
    
    sell_bp.view_functions['sell'] = debug_sell

with app.test_client\(\) as client:
    with client.session_transaction\(\) as sess:
        sess['user_id'] = 3
        sess['username'] = 'rexa'
    
    resp = client.get\('/sell?edit_listing_id=1'\)
    print\(f"Response: {resp.status_code}"\)
EOF)

        # Simulate what the route does

import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from core import create_app
app = create_app\(\)

# Find what module is actually registered for /sell
with app.app_context\(\):
    for rule in app.url_map.iter_rules\(\):
        if 'sell' in rule.rule.lower\(\) and 'edit' not in rule.rule.lower\(\):
            print\(f"Rule: {rule.rule} -> endpoint: {rule.endpoint}"\)
    
    # Get the actual view function
    sell_view = app.view_functions.get\('sell.sell'\)
    print\(f"\\nSell view function: {sell_view}"\)
    if sell_view:
        print\(f"  __wrapped__: {getattr\(sell_view, '__wrapped__', 'N/A'\)}"\)
        print\(f"  Module: {getattr\(sell_view, '__module__', 'N/A'\)}"\)
        # Check if it's a decorated function
        fn = sell_view
        while hasattr\(fn, '__wrapped__'\):
            fn = fn.__wrapped__
            print\(f"  Unwrapped: {fn} in {fn.__module__}"\)
EOF)

import sys, io
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)

from core import create_app
import json

app = create_app\(\)

with app.test_client\(\) as client:
    with client.session_transaction\(\) as sess:
        sess['user_id'] = 3
        sess['username'] = 'rexa'
    
    # POST to edit_listing with updated specs \(change price and quantity, keep existing photo\)
    form_data = {
        'metal': 'Palladium',
        'product_line': '80% Canadian Silver',
        'product_type': 'Bar',
        'weight': '1 kilo',
        'purity': '.958',
        'mint': 'Credit Suisse',
        'year': '1903',
        'finish': 'Bullion',
        'grade': 'AU-53',
        'series_variant': 'First_Day_of_Issue',
        'condition_category': 'Cull',
        'pricing_mode': 'static',
        'price_per_coin': '1250.00',   # Changed from 1000 to 1250
        'quantity': '3',               # Changed from 5 to 3
        'packaging_type': 'Capsule',   # Changed from Loose to Capsule
        'cert_number': '',
        'condition_notes': '',
        'actual_year': '',
        'edit_listing_id': '1',
        'keep_photo_ids': '1',         # Keep existing photo ID 1
        'is_isolated': '0',
        'is_set': '0',
    }
    
    resp = client.post\('/listings/edit_listing/1',
        data=form_data,
        content_type='multipart/form-data',
        headers={'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest'}
    \)
    
    print\(f"POST /listings/edit_listing/1: {resp.status_code}"\)
    
    try:
        data = json.loads\(resp.data.decode\(\)\)
        print\(f"Response data: {json.dumps\(data, indent=2\)[:500]}"\)
    except:
        print\(f"Response body: {resp.data.decode\(\)[:300]}"\)

# Check DB directly to verify the update

conn.close\(\)

import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)

from core import create_app
app = create_app\(\)

# Intercept the DB execute to print UPDATE statements
from database import get_db_connection as orig_get_db

import sqlite3

class DebugConnection:
    def __init__\(self, real_conn\):
        self._conn = real_conn
        self._conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
    
    def __getattr__\(self, name\):
        return getattr\(self._conn, name\)
    
    def execute\(self, query, params=None\):
        if 'UPDATE listings' in query.upper\(\) and 'SET' in query.upper\(\):
            # Find packaging_type position in params
            print\(f"[SQL INTERCEPT] UPDATE listings executing, params count: {len\(params\) if params else 0}"\)
            if params:
                # The packaging_type is at position 15 \(0-indexed\) in the params tuple
                print\(f"  params[0] \(category_id\): {params[0]}"\)
                print\(f"  params[1] \(quantity\): {params[1]}"\)
                print\(f"  params[2] \(price\): {params[2]}"\)
                print\(f"  params[15] \(packaging_type\): {params[15]!r}"\)
                print\(f"  params[20] \(listing_id\): {params[20]!r}"\)
        if params:
            return self._conn.execute\(query, params\)
        return self._conn.execute\(query\)
    
    def __enter__\(self\):
        return self
    
    def __exit__\(self, *args\):
        return self._conn.__exit__\(*args\)

# Patch
import database
orig_func = database.get_db_connection
def patched_get_db\(\):
    real = orig_func\(\)
    return DebugConnection\(real\)
database.get_db_connection = patched_get_db

import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from core import create_app
import json, sqlite3

app = create_app\(\)

# Check modules
with app.app_context\(\):
    sell_v = app.view_functions.get\('sell.sell'\)
    edit_v = app.view_functions.get\('listings.edit_listing'\)
    print\(f"sell.sell module: {getattr\(sell_v, '__module__', 'N/A'\)}"\)
    print\(f"listings.edit_listing module: {getattr\(edit_v, '__module__', 'N/A'\)}"\)

# Full end-to-end test
with app.test_client\(\) as client:
    with client.session_transaction\(\) as sess:
        sess['user_id'] = 3
        sess['username'] = 'rexa'
    
    # Step 1: GET sell page with edit_listing_id
    import re
    resp = client.get\('/sell?edit_listing_id=1'\)
    body = resp.data.decode\(\)
    
    match = re.search\(r'window\\.sellPrefillData\\s*=\\s*\(\\{.*?\\}\);', body, re.DOTALL\)
    if match:
        prefill = json.loads\(match.group\(1\)\)
        print\(f"\\nGET /sell?edit_listing_id=1: OK"\)
        print\(f"  metal: {prefill.get\('metal'\)}, price: {prefill.get\('price_per_coin'\)}, qty: {prefill.get\('quantity'\)}"\)
        print\(f"  grade: {prefill.get\('grade'\)}, series_variant: {prefill.get\('series_variant'\)}"\)
        print\(f"  packaging: {prefill.get\('packaging_type'\)}"\)
        print\(f"  existing_photos: {len\(prefill.get\('existing_photos', []\)\)}"\)
        print\(f"  sellEditMode: {re.search\(r'window\\\\.sellEditMode\\\\s*=\\\\s*\(\\\\w+\)', body\).group\(1\)}"\)
    
    # Step 2: POST update with changed specs
    form_data = {
        'metal': 'Palladium',
        'product_line': '80% Canadian Silver',
        'product_type': 'Bar',
        'weight': '1 kilo',
        'purity': '.958',
        'mint': 'Credit Suisse',
        'year': '1903',
        'finish': 'Bullion',
        'grade': 'AU-53',
        'series_variant': 'First_Day_of_Issue',
        'condition_category': 'Cull',
        'pricing_mode': 'static',
        'price_per_coin': '999.99',    # Changed price
        'quantity': '7',               # Changed quantity
        'item_packaging_type': 'Capsule',  # Changed packaging
        'condition_notes': 'Excellent condition test',
        'cert_number': 'TEST-12345',
        'edit_listing_id': '1',
        'keep_photo_ids': '1',         # Keep existing photo
        'is_isolated': '0',
        'is_set': '0',
    }
    
    resp = client.post\('/listings/edit_listing/1',
        data=form_data,
        content_type='multipart/form-data',
        headers={'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest'}
    \)
    
    data = json.loads\(resp.data.decode\(\)\)
    print\(f"\\nPOST /listings/edit_listing/1: success={data.get\('success'\)}"\)
    if not data.get\('success'\):
        print\(f"  Error: {data.get\('message'\)}"\)
    
    # Step 3: Verify in DB
    conn = sqlite3.connect\('data/database.db'\)
    conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
    r = conn.execute\('''
        SELECT l.quantity, l.price_per_coin, l.packaging_type, l.cert_number, l.condition_notes,
               c.metal, c.grade, c.series_variant
        FROM listings l JOIN categories c ON l.category_id = c.id
        WHERE l.id = 1
    '''\).fetchone\(\)
    conn.close\(\)
    
    print\(f"\\nDB verification:"\)
    print\(f"  quantity: {r['quantity']} \(expected 7\)"\)
    print\(f"  price: {r['price_per_coin']} \(expected 999.99\)"\)
    print\(f"  packaging_type: {r['packaging_type']!r} \(expected 'Capsule'\)"\)
    print\(f"  cert_number: {r['cert_number']!r} \(expected 'TEST-12345'\)"\)
    print\(f"  condition_notes: {r['condition_notes']!r}"\)
    print\(f"  metal: {r['metal']}, grade: {r['grade']}"\)
    
    all_pass = \(
        r['quantity'] == 7 and
        r['price_per_coin'] == 999.99 and
        r['packaging_type'] == 'Capsule' and
        r['cert_number'] == 'TEST-12345'
    \)
    print\(f"\\nAll checks passed: {all_pass}"\)
EOF)

# Full end-to-end test
with app.test_client\(\) as client:
    with client.session_transaction\(\) as sess:
        sess['user_id'] = 3
        sess['username'] = 'rexa'
    
    # Step 1: GET sell page
    resp = client.get\('/sell?edit_listing_id=1'\)
    body = resp.data.decode\(\)
    
    match = re.search\(r'window\\.sellPrefillData\\s*=\\s*\(\\{.*?\\}\);', body, re.DOTALL\)
    if match:
        prefill = json.loads\(match.group\(1\)\)
        em_match = re.search\(r'window\\.sellEditMode\\s*=\\s*\(\\w+\)', body\)
        em = em_match.group\(1\) if em_match else 'N/A'
        print\(f"\\nGET: sellEditMode={em}, metal={prefill.get\('metal'\)}, price={prefill.get\('price_per_coin'\)}, qty={prefill.get\('quantity'\)}, packaging={prefill.get\('packaging_type'\)}, photos={len\(prefill.get\('existing_photos', []\)\)}"\)
    
    # Step 2: POST update
    form_data = {
        'metal': 'Palladium',
        'product_line': '80% Canadian Silver',
        'product_type': 'Bar',
        'weight': '1 kilo',
        'purity': '.958',
        'mint': 'Credit Suisse',
        'year': '1903',
        'finish': 'Bullion',
        'grade': 'AU-53',
        'series_variant': 'First_Day_of_Issue',

        'condition_notes': 'Excellent condition test',

        'edit_listing_id': '1',
        'keep_photo_ids': '1',
        'is_isolated': '0',
        'is_set': '0',
    }
    
    resp = client.post\('/listings/edit_listing/1',
        data=form_data,
        content_type='multipart/form-data',
        headers={'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest'}
    \)
    
    data = json.loads\(resp.data.decode\(\)\)
    print\(f"\\nPOST: success={data.get\('success'\)}, msg={data.get\('message', 'N/A'\)}"\)
    
    # Step 3: Verify DB

    conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row

    all_ok = \(r['quantity'] == 7 and abs\(r['price_per_coin'] - 999.99\) < 0.01 and r['packaging_type'] == 'Capsule' and r['cert_number'] == 'TEST-12345'\)
